# Claude Code Ultimate Guide

> The most comprehensive documentation for Claude Code CLI by Anthropic. Covers beginner to advanced: hooks, skills, agents, MCP servers, context engineering, and production patterns.

## What is covered

- Getting started: installation, CLAUDE.md setup, vocabulary, first session
- Context window management: 200K token budget, context rot, /compact workflow
- Hook system: 9 hook events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, etc.), blocking vs non-blocking
- Skills and slash commands: creating reusable AI behaviors, trigger patterns
- Multi-agent orchestration: parallel agents, subagents, delegation patterns
- MCP server integration: setup, custom servers, 50+ available servers
- Context engineering: managing what the model sees, when, and in what shape
- Security and permission model: .claude/settings.json, allowed commands, audit
- Production templates: ready-to-use CLAUDE.md, rules, hooks, agents, quizzes
- Team knowledge infrastructure: 3-tier framework (Markdown vault, MCP connectors, RAG at scale), Code+Cowork bridge, Atlassian/Notion/GitBook MCP, Onyx/LlamaCloud/Ragie

## Key URLs

- Guide site: https://cc.bruniaux.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide
- Plugins: https://github.com/FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-plugins

## Author

Florian Bruniaux, AI engineer with 12+ months of production Claude Code usage. Former VP Engineering. Expert in context engineering and AI-assisted development workflows.

- Portfolio and blog: https://florian.bruniaux.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/florian-bruniaux-43408b83/
